Как это работает?

Чтобы начать зарабатывать, выполните 4 простых шага.
Регистрация
Пройдите простую регистрацию на нашем сайте.
Пополнение баланса
Пополните свой баланс любым удобным способом.
Открытие депозита
Выберите оптимальный план и откройте депозит.
Получение профита
Выводите прибыль на свой кошелек в автоматическом режиме.

WELCOME TO The world of automated investments.

Achieve your financial goals and start earning passive income. Blockchain solutions, investments in crypto-currency, automated trading of crypto dividends.

FOR OUR

INVESTORS

Aptoscommunity is a cryptocurrency investment company that contributes to the adoption and management of Decentralized Finance. Our mission is to make crypto investments accessible to everyone. Whether you are a rookie investor, crypto enthusiast, or an experienced investor looking to be part of a financial revolution — we’ve got you covered.
Future with

Aptoscommunity

Aptoscommunity are automated investment solutions that demonstrate ways to combine digital technologies, automated investment algorithms, and passive or active investment management based on a private investment fund. Aptoscommunity aims both to strengthen the investment potential of our company and to enable thousands of users to earn on cryptocurrencies with a strong and reliable partner like us. Aptoscommunity allows anyone to participate and contribute and be rewarded accordingly.
We invest in DeFi companies and projects because we believe that the future of finance is decentralized. We are advocating open-source, community owned and blockchain based financial solutions.
LEARN MORE
Promising
Directions
The stability of our company is based and supported by a professional analysis of the prospects of innovations that give a strong impulse to the continuous development of working strategies and the company as a whole.
Beneficial
rates
We have assembled a team of 40 experts in mining, investment, cryptocurrency, big data analytics and engineering. Owing to an experienced team, we can guarantee high earnings to everyone.
Quick
withdrawal of funds
Instant application processing, withdrawal of funds at exactly the specified time, without delays and commission surcharges.
SMART MARKETING AND STRATEGIES
Our investment plans guarantee you a stable passive income stream.

Investment proposals

We have developed individual tariff plans for you with different profitability, investment period and amount of funds.
